Class OfferTile

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board.Tile
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board.OfferTile
public class OfferTile extends Tile
An offer tile that players choose during the placing phase. It defines how many cards the occupying player may draw from the top and bottom lists.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    OfferTile(int drawTop, int drawBot, char offerTileID)
    Creates an offer tile with the given draw counts and identifier.
    OfferTile(OfferTile offerTile)
    Copy constructor — creates a defensive copy of another offer tile.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Action
    getActionAvailable()
    Returns the remaining draw actions available on this tile.
    char
    getOfferTileID()
    Returns the single-character identifier of this offer tile.

  • Constructor Details

    • OfferTile

      public OfferTile(int drawTop, int drawBot, char offerTileID)
      Creates an offer tile with the given draw counts and identifier.
      Parameters:
      drawTop - number of top-list draws available
      drawBot - number of bottom-list draws available
      offerTileID - single-character identifier for this tile (e.g. 'A', 'B', …)

    • OfferTile

      public OfferTile(OfferTile offerTile)
      Copy constructor — creates a defensive copy of another offer tile.
      Parameters:
      offerTile - the tile to copy

  • Method Details

    • getOfferTileID

      public char getOfferTileID()
      Returns the single-character identifier of this offer tile.
      Returns:
      the tile ID character

    • getActionAvailable

      public Action getActionAvailable()
      Returns the remaining draw actions available on this tile.
      Returns:
      the Action tracking remaining draws
